resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def minimizedStringLength(self, s: str) -> int:
        return len(set(s))
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The problem can be solved by simply finding the number of unique characters in the string. This is because for any character, we can always delete all its occurrences except one. Therefore, the minimum length of the string is equal to the number of unique characters. The set data structure in Python is used to find the unique characters, which has an average time complexity of O(n).
